title: dalbergia entadoides
intro: Dalbergia entadoides, also known as the Palosapis tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The extracts of Dalbergia entadoides have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing health benefits such as pain relief, wound healing, and protection against cell damage. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared in various herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and topical applications, to treat various ailments.
